languages.text: "Если так можно сказать. Капитан Дунавски представилась, а потом начала засыпать меня комплиментами. Искренними, но весьма безыскусными".
"If one can call it that. Captain Dunawski introduced herself, then began showering me with compliments. Sincere, yet quite artless."
languages.original_text: "Если так можно сказать. Капитан Дунавски представилась, а потом начала засыпать меня комплиментами. Искренними, но весьма безыскусными".

traits.locale_text: "If one can call it that. Captain Dunawski introduced herself, then began showering me with compliments. Sincere, yet quite artless."
"If one can call it that. Captain Dunawski introduced herself, then began showering me with compliments. Sincere, yet quite artless."
"If one can call it that. Captain Dunawski introduced herself, then began showering me with compliments. Sincere, yet quite artless."
"If one can call it that. Captain Dunawski introduced herself, then began showering me with compliments. Sincere, yet quite artless."

languages.text: "Wenn man es so nennen kann. Captain Dunawski hat sich vorgestellt und mich mit Komplimenten überhäuft. Aufrichtig, aber recht naiv."
languages.original_text: "If one can call it that. Captain Dunawski introduced herself, then began showering me with compliments. Sincere, yet quite artless."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn man es so nennen kann. Captain Dunawski hat sich vorgestellt und mich mit Komplimenten überhäuft. Aufrichtig, aber recht naiv."

languages.text: « N'exagérons rien. La capitaine Dunawski s'est présentée et s'est immédiatement mise à me noyer sous les compliments. J'apprécie sa sincérité, malgré son manque de manières. »
languages.original_text: "If one can call it that. Captain Dunawski introduced herself, then began showering me with compliments. Sincere, yet quite artless."

traits.locale_text: « N'exagérons rien. La capitaine Dunawski s'est présentée et s'est immédiatement mise à me noyer sous les compliments. J'apprécie sa sincérité, malgré son manque de manières. »

languages.text: «Podría decirse, más o menos. La capitana Dunawski se presentó y empezó a halagarme de forma sincera, aunque bastante rudimentaria».
languages.original_text: "If one can call it that. Captain Dunawski introduced herself, then began showering me with compliments. Sincere, yet quite artless."

traits.locale_text: «Podría decirse, más o menos. La capitana Dunawski se presentó y empezó a halagarme de forma sincera, aunque bastante rudimentaria».

languages.text: "Buna tanışmak denebilirse. Yüzbaşı Dunawski kendini tanıttı, sonra beni iltifatlara boğmaya başladı. Samimi ve bir o kadar yapmacıksız."
languages.original_text: "If one can call it that. Captain Dunawski introduced herself, then began showering me with compliments. Sincere, yet quite artless."

traits.locale_text: "Buna tanışmak denebilirse. Yüzbaşı Dunawski kendini tanıttı, sonra beni iltifatlara boğmaya başladı. Samimi ve bir o kadar yapmacıksız."

languages.text: “姑且算是吧。杜纳芙斯卡上尉自我介绍完，就开始对我大加恭维。诚意可嘉，可惜毫无技巧。”
languages.original_text: "If one can call it that. Captain Dunawski introduced herself, then began showering me with compliments. Sincere, yet quite artless."

traits.locale_text: “姑且算是吧。杜纳芙斯卡上尉自我介绍完，就开始对我大加恭维。诚意可嘉，可惜毫无技巧。”

languages.text: 「そう呼ぶなら。ダナウスキー艦長が自己紹介をした後、私を褒め始めた。誠実だが、どこか素朴な。」
languages.original_text: "If one can call it that. Captain Dunawski introduced herself, then began showering me with compliments. Sincere, yet quite artless."

traits.locale_text: 「そう呼ぶなら。ダナウスキー艦長が自己紹介をした後、私を褒め始めた。誠実だが、どこか素朴な。」
